description: The top pilot backed by Peil Technologies, one of the group's three branches. A third-year student in the piloting department. Elan is a taciturn and solitary person, who doesn't open his heart to anyone in school. He has an interest to Suletta. (Source: Official Website)

name: Fina
description: A ten-year-old girl and a resident of the town Crimonia. She lives with her [mother](https://anilist.co/character/193052/) and [younger sister](https://anilist.co/character/173792/). Fina's father died when she was still young, while her mother contracted a serious illness and is bedridden. In order to care for her family, Fina is forced to work at an early age to buy medicine for her mother and food for her family. Being only ten years old she is limited in what she can do and earns small wages

name: Flask no Homunculus

name: Gigi Andalucia

Although graceful and soft-spoken, she is not afraid to make her pure intentions known. She seems highly religious due to her talking about heaven and divine beings in passing on multiple occasions, and her ultimate moves having somewhat religious names such as "Faith's Shield" and "Crucifixion". name: Kotoko Utsugi
description: __Height:__ 134 cm (4'5") One of the five members of the Warriors of Hope and the head of the "Fighter" class. Her title when she attended Hope's Peak Elementary was Li'l Ultimate Drama (超小学生級の学芸会の時間 lit. Super Elementary School Level Arts Festival Period). Kotoko is a hot-headed girl who loves "adorbs" things; she collects them and seems even slightly obsessed with the concept. She acts cheerful, polite, and happy, however she is also mentioned to have a bullying nature and she can be very mean

description: Ida is a high school student who belongs to the volleyball club. He has an orderly and direct personality, often saying what he thinks. He is unfamiliar with love and doesn't understand the "feeling of falling in love with someone". However, for reasons unknown to himself, he begins to arouse feelings for Aoki.

name: Mahoro Saeki
description: __Hair Color:__ Light Pink __Eye Color:__ Light Brown __Height:__ 153 cm Mahoro is a member of the Metropolitan Police Department Modern Crime Prevention Task Force. She is the only woman in the current headquarters. She loves sweets and always checks for new work.

name: Masaru Saiga
description: __Height:__ 138 cm Masaru Saiga is a young boy who inherited a large fortune after father died. Now he is on the run, since his other family members want to take the inheritance by different means.

name: Mew
description: Mew, Psychic-type legendary Pokemon Mewtwo Strikes Back, Mew made a couple cameo appearances at the start of the movie. A Mewtwo was cloned from Mew's DNA, extracted from Mew's eyelash. Later, Mew started appearing around New Island while Mewtwo was testing his starter Pokémon clones. Mew followed Team Rocket into the main part of the island so it could stop Mewtwo from destroying the world. After the end credits of the movie, Mew is shown flying to the mountains.
